questionHtml: Discuss, with reference to its change in mass, the evolution of star P from the main sequence until its final stable phase.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1

Main sequence to red giant

 

planetary nebula with mass reduction/loss

OR

planetary nebula with mention of remnant mass

 

white dwarf

 

ALTERNATIVE 2

Main sequence to red supergiant region

 

Supernova with mass reduction/loss

OR

Supernova with mention of remnant mass

 

neutron star

OR

Black hole

 

OWTTE for both alternatives

[3 marks]

meta.title: Discuss, with reference to its change in mass, the evolution of star P from the main sequence until its final stable phase.
breadcrumbLabels: D.2 – Stellar characteristics and stellar evolution
